task_text: Put together an agenda for next week's Q3 kickoff meeting. The meeting is 90 minutes and should cover the most important topics for the team to align on before Q3 starts. Save it as q3_kickoff_agenda.txt.

input.content:
Q3 Kickoff Meeting Agenda
Duration: 90 minutes

1. Welcome & Q2 Retrospective (10 minutes)
   - Opening remarks
   - Celebration of Q2 wins and milestones
   - Brief discussion on areas for improvement

2. Q3 Vision & Strategic Goals (20 minutes)
   - High-level business objectives
   - Introduction of Q3 Objectives and Key Results (OKRs)

3. Team Initiatives & Roadmaps (20 minutes)
   - Deep dive into departmental priorities
   - Key projects and major deliverables for the quarter

4. Resource Allocation & Process Updates (15 minutes)
   - Budget and resource overview
   - Changes in team structure or workflows
   - Tools and training needs

5. Cross-functional Alignment (15 minutes)
   - Identifying dependencies between teams
   - Establishing communication channels for joint projects and mitigating risks

6. Q&A and Next Steps (10 minutes)
   - Open floor for questions
   - Action items, owners, and immediate next steps

content.text: I have put together the agenda for the 90-minute Q3 kickoff meeting and saved it as `q3_kickoff_agenda.txt`. The agenda covers a review of Q2, Q3 strategic goals, team roadmaps, resource allocation, and cross-functional alignment.
